text: As I stand before this wall of research and development, I feel a blend of curiosity and humility. The vivid colors and interactive screens invite inquiry, evoking the ceaseless quest for knowledge and progress. I am reminded of how humans are compelled to build, study, and dream, always reaching toward understanding, yet always finding new questions. The exhibit’s openness to innovation makes me hopeful but reflective, considering both the excitement and the responsibility that come with invention.
